tagline: Asian comfort kitchen on West Windsor Road, Glendale.

hero.heading: Family kitchen on Windsor.
hero.subheading: An Asian comfort kitchen on West Windsor Road, open weekdays for lunch and dinner. Hand-cooked plates, family recipes, ten-and-a-half hours of service from eleven in the morning until nine-thirty at night.

about.label: The kitchen
about.heading: Mom's recipes. Two cooks. Lunch and dinner.
paragraphs: Taste of Windsor has been on West Windsor Road since 2018. Two cooks in the kitchen, family recipes on the menu, and a service that runs straight through from eleven in the morning to nine-thirty at night.
We do made-to-order plates — no microwaves, no shortcuts. Lunch combos, family-style dinner plates, and the kind of comfort food that brings the regulars back twice a week.
Closed Saturday and Sunday — those are the days we cook for our own families. Open Monday through Friday, lunch straight through dinner.

services.title: Lunch Combo
services.description: Choice of protein, jasmine rice, side, and soup. The full lunch in twelve minutes. Available 11–3.

services.title: Family Plate
services.description: Family-size protein dish over rice, plus two sides. Enough for two, or one with leftovers tomorrow.

services.title: Noodle Bowl
services.description: Hand-pulled noodles, scratch-made broth, your choice of protein. Comfort in a bowl.

services.title: Rice Plate
services.description: Wok-tossed protein over steamed jasmine rice with sautéed greens. The everyday plate.

services.title: Veggie Plate
services.description: Wok-fried seasonal vegetables, tofu, jasmine rice, house garlic-soy. Vegan-friendly.

services.title: House Soup
services.description: The day's stock-pot soup. Sometimes chicken, sometimes pork, always made that morning.

reviews.name: Cheryl K.
reviews.text: Taste of Windsor is the lunch spot in Glendale. Three years going twice a week and the lunch combo has never disappointed. Made-to-order, twelve minutes flat, fifteen dollars even.

reviews.name: Dan P.
reviews.text: Brought my whole family for a weeknight dinner and we ordered four family plates. Three generations, four plates, eighty dollars, and the leftovers fed everyone again the next day.

reviews.name: Lily M.
reviews.text: Walked in for a Tuesday lunch and was eating the best garlic-soy chicken of my month by 12:18. The owner came out and asked how I'd heard about them. Family shop.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Taste of Windsor, 123 W Windsor Rd, Glendale, CA 91204

seo.title: Taste of Windsor — Asian comfort kitchen in Glendale
seo.description: Family-run Asian comfort kitchen on West Windsor Road, Glendale. Lunch combos, family plates, noodle bowls. Open weekdays 11 to 9:30.
